# LEco DevOps Open Project

> One-click deploy for almost any application on a local cloud edge. LEco reads Docker Compose, Wrangler, and env config, converts manifests, orchestrates Traefik and Compose, and ships on *.lh — free, MIT-licensed, community-driven open source.

LEco DevOps Open Project (application: **LEco DevOps**) is the canonical name. Official repository: https://github.com/leco-devops/local-ecosystem. Public site: https://leco-project.us. License: MIT.

## Primary capabilities

- **One-click onboarding:** `leco-devops onboard` and dashboard Detect → Generate YAML → Register → Deploy
- **Platform tab:** dev stack builder (WordPress, Magento, Laravel, LAMP/MEAN, custom components), cloud/local settings, ecosystem bundles
- **Hosted apps:** third-party repos under `hosting/app-available/<slug>/` without polluting upstream trees
- **Edge:** Traefik, mkcert TLS, `*.lh` DNS, split API + UI routes
- **AI:** Ollama, Open WebUI, AirLLM, n8n
- **Optional:** Cloudflare-local (R2, KV, D1, Workers-style on `*.lh`), cloud VM profiles

## USP

Deploy first, configure later. Read → Convert → Orchestrate → Deploy. No mandatory rewrite of existing apps for LEco.

- [Project site](https://leco-project.us): landing, vision, mission, FAQ

- [CLI](https://github.com/leco-devops/local-ecosystem/blob/main/docs/DEPLOY_CLI.md): `leco-devops` commands
